holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: GNMX is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Thermo Fisher Scientific stock at 8.46%, Vertex Pharmaceuticals at 7.09%, Alnylam Pharmaceuticals at 4.20%, Illumina at 4.04%, and Guardant Health at 3.70%.

overview.description: The Corgi Genomics & Precision Medicine ETF (GNMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks capital appreciation through a portfolio of companies tiedto thegenomics and precision medicine value chain, from sequencing platforms and bioinformatics engines to gene editors, molecular diagnostics, targeted therapies, and clinical data platforms. GNMX was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
